reasoning: Meta has shown strong ambition and capability with the Llama 3.* series, occasionally reaching close to the top of the Chatbot arena. However, by late 2025, competitors like OpenAI (GPT-5/o2), Google (Gemini 2+), and Anthropic (Claude 4) are expected to aggressively contest the #1 spot. While Llama 4 is training and expected in 2025, it typically pushes the frontier for open-weights models rather than strictly maintaining the absolute #1 spot on the Chatbot Arena leaderboard, which is fiercely competitive and often features very recent, highly tuned proprietary models from OpenAI and Google. Additionally, if there is a tie, alphabetical order gives Meta an advantage against OpenAI and xAI, but a disadvantage against Anthropic and Google. Considering the intense competition and frequency of OpenAI releases claiming the top spot, Meta's chances of holding the exact top spot on December 31, 2025, are estimated around 12%.
